issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error scenarios or fallback steps when required data is missing.

scenarios.name: Diagnose poor LCP on a Next.js marketing landing page
scenarios.rationale: Both mention next/image priority and WebP, but treatment identifies the LCP element, ranks fixes with expected ms improvements, adds critical-CSS inlining, and includes a TTFB sanity check.

scenarios.name: Reduce INP on a React 18 dashboard with a 30k-row grid
scenarios.rationale: Both suggest useMemo + virtualization, but treatment ranks root causes with per-fix ms estimates, calls out third-party scripts on the click path, and uses requestIdleCallback / scheduler.yield.
